content: Area 51 World operates indoor, space-themed family entertainment centres offering age-zoned play, parties, cafes, group bookings and selected snow, VR and adults-only experiences.

Publicly operating locations covered in this dataset are Underwood, Mt Gravatt/Garden City, Redcliffe, Helensvale, Ipswich/Bundamba and Castle Hill. Strathpine appears in navigation but lacks a complete public information page in this review.
HQ hotline is 07 4351 5151. General enquiries are monitored 9am–9pm daily; party enquiries 9am–5pm Monday–Friday. Online booking is recommended because phones may be busy.
Online booking is strongly recommended/treated as essential. Walk-ins may be accepted, but availability is not guaranteed, especially on weekends and school holidays.
Area 51 grip socks are mandatory on play equipment. Previously purchased Area 51 socks may be reused; other brands of grip socks are not accepted according to venue FAQs.
A waiver is required for every participant. Customers can sign through their account or the link in the confirmation email.
Guests are asked to arrive about 15 minutes before the booked session and present the emailed QR code.
Ages 0–4 generally include one complimentary adult supervisor. Additional supervisors may be purchased.
For ages 5–12, adults who participate on equipment require their own applicable ticket.
Children must not be left unattended.
Parental/adult supervision remains required; staff supervise equipment and rules but are not a childcare service.
No participation with a cast. Many attractions also exclude people with specified injuries, heart/respiratory conditions, pregnancy, sprains or broken bones.

Outside food is generally prohibited because of allergen transfer. Common stated exceptions are refillable personal water bottles, nut-free birthday cakes with applicable cakeage, and party bags intended to be taken home.
Only nut-free cakes are allowed. General-admission cakeage is shown as $10 on venue FAQ pages.
The venues state that they are wheelchair accessible. A carer accompanying a paid guest may enter free with a valid Companion Card.
Lost property should be reported promptly by phone or email; venue FAQs state uncollected items may be disposed of after one week.
Smoking and vaping are prohibited. Unsafe, abusive or bullying behaviour can result in removal without refund.
Activities for toddlers, children, teenagers and adults; individual attractions have age/height/weight limits.
Space Shuttle Inflatable (ages 5–12, no adults, maximum 91 kg)
Leap of Faith (ages 5+, minimum 120 cm, 20–90 kg)
High Ropes (ages 5+, normally minimum 120 cm independently, maximum 113 kg; 110–120 cm requires an adult helper aged 18+ according to the safety policy)
Snow House (small -5°C snow room; enclosed footwear required)
VR attractions including UFO/Dragon Rider where offered
2nd Floor, Westfield Mt Gravatt, Kessels Road, Upper Mount Gravatt, QLD 4122
9:00 am–9:00 pm daily on the venue cafe page; the activities hub has shown different day-specific hours, so confirm live.
9:00 am–7:00 pm Monday–Thursday and Sunday; 9:00 am–9:00 pm Friday–Saturday on the venue cafe page
9:00 am–6:00 pm Monday–Thursday and Sunday; 9:00 am–8:00 pm Friday–Saturday
Westfield Helensvale, Millaroo Drive, Helensvale, QLD 4212
9:00 am–9:00 pm daily on the venue cafe page; the activities hub has shown shorter Sun–Thu hours, so confirm live.
Toddlers, children, teenagers and adults; individual activities have restrictions.
Snow World, approximately 1,000 sqm (ages 3+; parent supervision for ages 3–4; enclosed shoes)
High Ropes (ages 7+, minimum 122 cm, maximum 85 kg)
Climbing Walls (ages 5+, minimum 108 cm and 18 kg, maximum 130 kg)
16–18 Victoria Avenue / Showground Road, Castle Hill, NSW 2154; Southside Building, HomeCo, Level 1
Children aged 12 and under for standard play.
0–2: School-term weekday — $15. Toddler Zone; infants 0–11 months free with another paying guest, otherwise $15.
5–12: School-term weekday 1 hour — $17. Full venue except Toddler Zone.
0–2: Any listed day type — $15. Toddler Zone; infants 0–11 months free with another paying guest, otherwise $15.
3–4: School-term weekday 1 hour — $17. Full venue except Super Climber.
5–12: School-term weekday 1 hour — $17. Full venue except Toddler Zone.
0–2: Any listed day type — $15. Toddler Zone; infants 0–11 months free with another paying guest, otherwise $15.
5–12: School-term weekday 1 hour — $16. Full venue except Toddler Zone.
0–2: School-term weekday — $15. Toddler area; infants 0–11 months free with another paying guest, otherwise $15.
3–4: School-term weekday 1 hour — $17. Trampoline Park, Rocket Inflatable, Gizmo’s Galaxy and Galacticity.
5–12: School-term weekday 1 hour — $17. Choose High Ropes or Climbing Walls where eligible.
5–12 Power Play: School-term weekday promotional 2 hours — $27. Includes both major climbing activities where eligible.
13+: School-term weekday 1 hour — $17. Choose one climbing activity.
13+ Power Play: School-term weekday promotional 2 hours — $27.
VIP 'The Lot': 3 hours — Check live booking page. Includes a broad activity bundle and socks; restrictions apply.
3–4: School-term weekday 1 hour — $18. Toddler Zone and Gizmo’s Galaxy.
5–12: School-term weekday 1 hour — $18. Gizmo’s Galaxy, slides, ninja, Super Climber if tall enough, and Sports Court.
High Ropes add-on: 20 minutes — $5. Must occur within the main play session.
Climbing Walls add-on: 20 minutes — $5. Must occur within the main play session.
Snow World: Standalone or add-on — $25. May be scheduled outside the main play session.
VIP: 3 hours — Check live booking page. Includes broad play access, Snow World and socks; restrictions apply.
3–4: School-term weekday 1 hour — $18. Toddler Zone, Gizmo’s Odyssey and Free Jump.
5–12: School-term weekday 1 hour — $18. Full standard venue except Toddler Zone, Snow World and VR add-ons.
Snow World: Standalone or add-on — $25. Check live times.
Classic $42 pp; Ultimate $46 pp; Deluxe $52 pp. Minimum 10; normally maximum 16 per room; two packages can accommodate up to 32.
Classic $42 pp; Ultimate $46 pp; Deluxe $52 pp. Standard packages 10–14; Mega package 18–26.
Classic $42 pp; Ultimate $46 pp; Deluxe $52 pp. Minimum 10; maximum 14 per room.
Classic $45 pp; Ultimate $49 pp; Deluxe $55 pp. Minimum 10; maximum 14 per room.
Classic $45 pp; Ultimate $49 pp; Deluxe $55 pp. Minimum 10; maximum 16 per room.
Classic Check live party page; Ultimate Check live party page; Deluxe Check live party page. Minimum 10; maximum 14 per room.
A 50% deposit is required when booking.
For weekend parties, final changes and the final invoice are generally due by Wednesday at 5:00 pm AEST. Add-ons and grazing boards must be added by the same deadline.
All parties must be paid in full at least three days before the event; non-payment may lead to cancellation.
The birthday child is included in the guest count.
Siblings or other children outside the party package need their own pre-booked general-admission tickets.
Supervising adults may observe free; adults who participate need the appropriate ticket.
A standard pizza is described as 12 inches and eight slices.
Dietary requirements should be emailed before the party deadline.
Guests may generally bring only a nut-free cake, candles, weighted balloons, take-home lolly/party bags and refillable water. No other outside food, smash cakes, confetti or party poppers.
Parents/organisers should arrive about 30 minutes early and guests about 15 minutes early. Late arrivals lose play time because catering and room times are fixed.
Waivers should be sent/completed before arrival, and RSVPs should be finalised around 10 days before the event.

Rescheduling with more than seven days’ notice may be allowed up to 12 months ahead, subject to availability. Within seven days, a $150 rescheduling/cancellation fee is stated; deposits and payments remain non-refundable. Requests must be made in writing.
13+ Mystery Tour: After hours 9pm–9am; minimum 100 people — $45 play only / $55 with pizza and chips.
1–2: Weekend-holiday — $13 / $18 shown in separate rows; duration label is ambiguous on the page.
Iced: Iced Long Black / Coffee / Latte / Chai / Matcha — $5.50.
Hot drinks: Hot Chocolate / Chai Latte / Earl Grey / Green Tea / English Breakfast / Peppermint — $4.50.
Smoothies: Tropical / Acai / Mixed Berry / Mango — $9.50.
Pizza: Margherita / Pepperoni / Vegetarian / BBQ Meat Lovers, 8 slices — $18.
Kids: Popcorn Chicken / Mini Pizza / Penne Pasta / Snack Box — $10.
Online booking and Area 51 socks are described as essential. Walk-ins are not guaranteed, particularly weekends and holidays.
All participants must complete a waiver before participating; it may be signed through the account or confirmation-email link.
Guests are asked to arrive 15 minutes before the session and show the emailed QR code.
Bookings may be amended up to 24 hours before the visit through the location-specific online account.
All bookings are generally non-refundable; management considers exceptions individually and approval is not guaranteed.
A no-show forfeits the ticket; no reschedule, refund or credit is provided.
Cancelling or requesting a play-pass date/time change within 24 hours forfeits payment.
The privacy policy says Area 51 may collect names, contact and payment details plus demographic, aggregate and preference information.
Information is used for transactions/services, service improvement, communications/promotions/updates and legal compliance.
Parents/guardians and individuals may request review, correction or deletion of relevant personal information.
Gift cards are location-specific and redeemable at the branch where purchased.
The Underwood gift-card page states a 36-month validity period and partial use over multiple visits.
Applicants must be at least 13, have Australian work rights, and successful applicants must obtain a Working With Children Check/Blue Card.
Gizmo Courts at 51 Kingston Road, Underwood is open daily 9am–8pm.
Pickleball 30 minutes costs $12 from 9am–4pm weekdays and $15 from 4pm–8pm weekdays and all weekend.
Pickleball 1 hour costs $20 from 9am–4pm weekdays and $25 from 4pm–8pm weekdays and all weekend.
Padel 1 hour costs $45 from 9am–4pm weekdays and $60 from 4pm–8pm weekdays and all weekend.
Paddle hire is $10 per paddle with a $20 refundable deposit per paddle on arrival.

Mt Gravatt operating hours: The venue cafe page states play 9am–9pm daily, while the activities hub has shown 9am–7pm Sun–Wed and 9am–9pm Thu–Sat. Recommended handling: Use the venue-specific page or live booking page as the higher-priority source and ask customers to confirm for a particular date.

Helensvale operating hours: The venue cafe page states play 9am–9pm daily, while the activities hub has shown 9am–7pm Sun–Thu and 9am–9pm Fri–Sat. Recommended handling: Use the venue-specific page or live booking page and verify date-specific hours.

Redcliffe operating hours: A hub summary has shown shorter hours than the Redcliffe-specific cafe page. Recommended handling: Prefer the Redcliffe-specific page; confirm public-holiday and special-event hours.

Underwood High Ropes minimum height: Some venue copy states 120 cm minimum, while the safety policy allows 110–120 cm with an adult helper aged 18+. Recommended handling: Answer with the full conditional rule and advise checking staff eligibility at booking.

Group-booking deposit deadline: Group pages show both '5 business days after booking' and 'within 7 days' for the 50% deposit. Recommended handling: Do not state one as definitive; direct the customer to the invoice or Groups team.
Castle Hill group price for ages 1–2: The page shows $13 and $18 in separate weekend/holiday rows without a clear duration on one row. Recommended handling: Mark as ambiguous and verify at checkout.

Events and promotions: What's On, Adults Only dates, giveaways, discount codes and ticket discounts change quickly and may remain indexed after expiry. Recommended handling: Do not treat as evergreen. Check the live page and current date before answering.
